passiveAbilities.name: Weakling
passiveAbilities.description: Reduce all Melee Dmg this character deals by -1. Harvest actions cost this model +1 energy.

activeAbilities.name: Rouse
activeAbilities.description: Target Faun or Animal restores 1 Wd and gains +2 energy.

arcaneAbilities.name: Shoot Shortbow
arcaneAbilities.description:
This ability cannot be used while this model is engaged.
Target suffers X Piercing Dmg.
Catastrophe: This ability cannot be used for the remainder of the game.

arcaneAbilities.name: Healing
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target restores X+1 Wds.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 2 Wds.

signatureMove.name: Love Potion
signatureMove.endStepEffect: Reduce Melee Dmg suffered by -1. Choose a character you control. Move the enemy 3" directly towards that character. The enemy cannot target that character with an action until end of turn.
